spec.name: The City Entrance
spec.description: You are at the entrance to a small underground city. A great adamantite gate lies open to the west allowing entrance into the city.

west.description: A huge gate opens to the west allowing entrance into the city.

up.description: A passageway opens up into a fairly large cave above.

extra_descs.description: A large adamantite gate with giant spider shaped emblems stands here.
